query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(m.id) as actual_media_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN media m ON p.id = m.projectId
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Forney%'
GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(m.id) as actual_media_count
FROM projects p
